DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Edward Lopez appeared in propria persona 822-2475, demurring party
Geoffrey Adams, Esq., 956-4450, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
No argument was made and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANTS EDWARD LOPEZ and MELE LOPEZ'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Counsel for plaintiff is ordered to serve the defendants with a copy of the amended complaint and file proof of service with the Court. (CB/301/EH) Reporter: Patty Lee Dubble, CSR #3058
